entry.title: New: Bill 2933 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2024-10-16
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 8, KAUA‘I COUNTY CODE 1987, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE COMPREHENSIVE ZONING ORDINANCE, INCLUDING MATTERS PERTAINING TO GUEST HOUSES (Kaua‘i County Council, Applicant) (ZA-2024-3 – Planning Commission Recommendation)

Latest action: On agenda 2024-10-16

View on the council site
